name: Sunrise Pawnbrokers Inc.
description_short: Sunrise Pawnbrokers Inc. is a Fort Lauderdale-based pawn shop offering collateral-based cash loans, gold and diamond buying, and merchandise purchasing services.
description_long:
Sunrise Pawnbrokers Inc. operates as a traditional pawn shop located in Fort Lauderdale, Florida, positioned just south of Oakland Park Boulevard on North Federal Highway. The business has established itself as a local pawn broker serving the South Florida community with personalized service and expert evaluation of items. The company operates with limited hours—Monday through Friday from 9:30 A.M. to 5:00 P.M., and Saturday from 9:30 A.M. to 1:00 P.M., with Sunday closures—positioning itself as a neighborhood-based operation rather than a 24/7 service.

Sunrise Pawnbrokers offers three primary service categories based on their contact form options: low-interest cash loans secured by personal property collateral, purchase of gold and diamonds, and buying merchandise from customers. The pawn model allows customers to leverage valuable items for immediate cash without traditional credit checks, appealing to those needing quick liquidity. Their emphasis on gold and diamond transactions suggests specialization in precious metals and jewelry, which typically represent higher-value transactions in the pawn industry.

The company distinguishes itself through direct local presence and accessibility via phone (954-563-3147) with a commitment to respond to inquiries within 24-48 hours. Their website includes a detailed contact form and clear operational transparency regarding hours and location. The mention of "trusted pawn experts" suggests staff expertise in item evaluation, which is critical for fair transactions in this industry. Their specific geographic positioning ("just south of Oakland Park Boulevard") indicates established, recognizable location awareness.

As a pawn shop, Sunrise Pawnbrokers serves a legitimate financial function for consumers needing immediate cash, though customers should understand the collateral-based nature of these transactions. The limited hours may present accessibility challenges for working professionals. The website provides minimal detail about loan terms, interest rates, redemption periods, or fee structures—information critical for informed consumer decision-making. Like all pawn transactions, items not redeemed are sold, and customers should understand this business model before pledging valuable property.
address: 3043 N Federal Hwy, Fort Lauderdale, FL 33306

company_info.headquarters: 3043 N Federal Hwy, Fort Lauderdale, FL 33306

pros: Local, established brick-and-mortar location in Fort Lauderdale with clear address and directions
Direct phone line (954-563-3147) for immediate customer contact and inquiries
Commitment to respond to all customer inquiries within 24-48 hours
Specializes in high-value items including gold and diamonds with stated 'trusted experts'
No credit check required—accessible to those with poor or no credit history
Same-day cash availability through collateral-based lending model
Multiple service options: cash loans, buying gold/diamonds, and purchasing merchandise
cons: Very limited operating hours (closed Sundays, closes at 5 P.M. weekdays, 1 P.M. Saturday) make access difficult for working professionals
Website lacks transparent disclosure of loan terms, interest rates, fees, and redemption periods
No online application or virtual appraisal options—requires in-person visit for all transactions
Minimal online information about their evaluation process, item categories accepted, or loan amounts offered
Pawn model inherently means unredeemed items are forfeited and resold—high-risk for valuable personal property
best_for: Individuals needing immediate cash with valuable items (jewelry, gold, electronics) to pledge as collateral
Customers with poor credit or no credit history seeking quick liquidity without credit checks
Local Fort Lauderdale residents seeking face-to-face transactions with neighborhood pawn experts
Sellers of gold, diamonds, and precious metals looking for fair appraisal and immediate payment
diagnosis: Sunrise Pawnbrokers is best for Fort Lauderdale-area residents needing immediate cash and willing to pledge valuable items (gold, jewelry, electronics) as collateral. The main caveat is that unredeemed items are forfeited and sold by the shop, so customers should only pawn items they can afford to lose—combined with very limited operating hours that may inconvenience many consumers.
services: Low-interest cash loans secured by personal property collateral
Same-day cash disbursement for pledged items
